message:
feat(fuzz): add fuzz_mmap + file full-review findings (bd-dvr22 + 4 bug beads)

cc-libc FULL REVIEW MODE pass, invoked because the drain queue was
idle and the user requested active test+clippy+fuzz sweep.

## Test findings (filed via br create --no-db)

- bd-g2bd5 [CRITICAL]: glibc_internal_abi_test SIGABRTs with
  "free(): invalid size" under default parallel test execution.
  Passes cleanly with --test-threads=1 (172/172, 0.04s). Reproduced
  on two independent rch workers. Heap corruption localized to a
  concurrent free on shared thread-local / TLS-dtor / resolv-context
  / IDNA state.
- bd-i3om4 [HIGH]: runtime_policy::tests::ffi_pcc_decide_uses_
  certificate_gate_for_memcpy panics at runtime_policy.rs:2168 under
  `cargo test -p frankenlibc-abi --lib`; passes in isolation. At
  least one static/thread-local touched by the certificate-gate path
  is outside the existing ffi_pcc_lock / reset_ffi_pcc_state_for_tests
  coverage.
- bd-gilq3 [HIGH]: bd15n2_fixture_gap_fill_artifacts_test fails with
  "could not locate libfrankenlibc_abi.so" whenever CARGO_TARGET_DIR
  is redirected away from target/. Test-infra gate script hardcodes
  the default target path.
- bd-nnjiz [MEDIUM]: malloc::elimination::symmetric_workload_exceeds_
  target_success_rate flakes at ~24% vs 30% threshold under shared
  rch-worker load. Not a correctness regression — the elimination
  path is exercised (>80% of attempts either succeed or collide
  cleanly), threshold is just pessimistic for heterogeneous hosts.

cargo test --workspace --all-targets -- --test-threads=1 PASSED,
confirming all four findings are parallel-test-only races.
cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings clean.

## Fuzz gap enumeration (bd-dvr22)

Discovery pass cross-referenced 3646 `pub unsafe extern "C" fn`
symbols across 38 ABI modules against the 30 registered fuzz bins.
Eight modules still have no fuzz target at all; filed as a single
umbrella bead prioritized by CVE-class risk: mmap (1), signal (2),
socket (3), fortify (4), setjmp (5), dlfcn (6), pthread (7),
c11threads (8).

## New fuzz target delivered (priority 1 from bd-dvr22)

crates/frankenlibc-fuzz/fuzz_targets/fuzz_mmap.rs — stateful harness
for mmap/munmap/mprotect/msync/madvise/mremap with:
- live-mapping arena (≤4 mappings/iter, 4-64 KiB per mapping)
- 7 ops including MarkStaleInPlace to exercise the use-after-unmap
  contract (every op on a Stale slot must return -1 / MAP_FAILED)
- alignment invariant on mmap / mremap return addresses
- guard-byte sentinels on PROT_WRITE-bearing mappings, asserted on
  end-of-iter sweep to catch off-by-one munmap / mremap
- intentional PROT_EXEC / RWX requests to exercise the hardened
  membrane's refuse-or-clamp path (never dereferenced)
- MAP_PRIVATE | MAP_ANONYMOUS with fd=-1 so the fs / fd surface is
  untouched; global MMAP_LOCK serializes iterations

Validation: cargo build --bin fuzz_mmap clean (17.5s); cargo clippy
--bin fuzz_mmap --no-deps -- -D warnings clean after one
needless-lifetimes fix.

Agent: cc-libc
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -60,6 +60,11 @@ name = "fuzz_pidfd_timer"
 path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_pidfd_timer.rs"
 doc = false
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_mmap"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_mmap.rs"
+doc = false
+
 [[bin]]
 name = "fuzz_resolver"
 path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_resolver.rs"
